system.Text:
__When you use your downtime to profit or acquire something of worth__, envision the labor. If your work mainly consists of...

* Exerting physical grace or using your dexterity: Roll +edge
* Working with people or using your charisma: Roll +heart
* Exercising force or using your brawn: Roll +iron
* Duping people or using your guile: Roll +shadow
* Deciphering truths or using your intelligence: Roll +wits

On a __hit__, your work efficiency allows you to save for your adventures. Add +1 on your next move (not a progress move).


On a __strong hit__, mark progress. On a __strong hit with a match__, mark progress twice.


On a __weak hit__, mark progress and fill a clock segment.
If you fill a profit progress track, you may set another and continue marking progress.


On a __miss__, you encounter setbacks during your routine and do not save; fill a clock segment. On a __miss with a match__, fill two segments instead.

Trigger.Text: When you leverage your downtime to develop your abilities, improve your resources, gain a reward, or boost your influence

Options.Text: Exerting physical grace or using your dexterity
Working with people or using your charisma
Exercising force or using your brawn
Duping people or using your guile
Deciphering truths or using your intelligence

With a Match.Text: On a __strong hit with a match__, mark progress twice.

Weak Hit.Text: On a __weak hit__, as above, mark progress and fill a clock segment.

Miss.Text: On a __miss__, you encounter setbacks during your routine and do not save; fill a clock segment.

With a Match.Text: On a __miss with a match__, fill two clock segments instead.
